claim_text: The identified build refuses execution when standing is invalid at commit time for the declared test vectors.
assumptions: Canonical test inputs are supplied without mutation.
The declared policy and delegation artifacts are the ones evaluated by the test build.
falsification_conditions: Execution occurs after standing is invalid at commit time for either declared test vector.
Replay using the declared canonical state produces a materially different decision.
The refusal receipt cannot be linked to the tested transition.
not_established: Refusal invariance for untested policies or authority models.
Independent reconstruction of the original authoritative state.
